name: Dom's Nuclear Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs meat. (Ground or cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce: Add 8 cups boiling water to New Mexico, Ancho, Pasilla, Anaheim, and Cascabel Chiles. Let soak for 30 minutes. Place in a blender with half of the soaking water plus fresh water and beer. Add 2 cloves of garlic and blend for about 3 minutes. Strain the resulting puree into a pot.
2. Add cumin, salt, oregano, Chipotle, and habanero chiles to the sauce. Simmer.
3. Prepare the rest of the chili: Cook bacon until crispy. Eat the bacon. Add garlic, peppers, onion to the bacon fat and cook for 2 minutes. Brown the meat in the bacon fat. Add the chili sauce and simmer for a few hours.
4. Add corn or beans about 1 hour before serving. Skim off any excess fat before serving.
You may use a different variety of chiles. Be creative and experiment.
